name: Straight Satans Motorcycle Club
description: The Straight Satans Motorcycle Club was a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle gang based in Southern California, founded in July 1959 by three bikers known as Father Bill, Little Jerry, and Glick. It was among the earliest outlaw motorcycle clubs in the Los Angeles area, but remained localized without chapters beyond its original base.

sources.title: Mongols MC criminal allegations and incidents — Wikipedia
